description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house enclosed by a low boundary wall with metal gates at the front. The facade features a mix of materials, including a prominent stone-textured section, dark wood or composite cladding, and large glass windows. The front yard is landscaped with grass and a series of wide, shallow steps leading to the main entrance, which is sheltered by a glass canopy. The house has a flat roof with a rooftop terrace and a vertical architectural element, possibly a chimney or ventilation shaft, running up one side. Windows are asymmetrically placed, with some extending to the corners, and the rear and side elevations are more minimal, with fewer openings. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of natural and industrial materials.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, stone and wood cladding, large glass windows, and a landscaped front yard with wide steps and metal gates.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide steps, landscaped yard, glass canopy, and a mix of stone and wood cladding.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the flat roof, vertical architectural element, asymmetrical window placement, and the continuation of the boundary wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, windowless wall with the flat roof and rooftop terrace visible above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the vertical architectural feature, minimal window openings, and the side yard with steps.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels and corner windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide set of steps, a glass canopy, and a modern door set into a stone-textured facade, with metal gates at the property boundary.
